description_long: This object consists of two large wooden barrels and three wooden crates arranged together. The barrels are cylindrical with slightly bulging sides, reinforced by metallic hoops at the top, middle, and bottom, and feature a natural wood grain texture. One barrel has red painted text partially visible, while the crates are cubic with visible wooden slats and one marked 'Fragile' in red. The barrels and crates have a matte, unfinished wood appearance, and the barrels are likely hollow inside, designed to store or transport goods. The crates are stackable and robust, suitable for shipping or storage. This set would commonly be found in urban environments such as warehouses, alleys, or loading docks.
description: A group of two wooden barrels with metal hoops and three wooden crates, one marked 'Fragile', all with a natural wood finish and visible grain.
description_view_0: Two barrels and three crates are visible, with the crates stacked and one marked 'Fragile'; the barrels show partial red text.
description_view_1: The barrels are in the foreground with more of the red text visible, and the crates are stacked behind them.
description_view_2: The barrels are seen from the back with no visible markings, and the crates are clearly stacked to the right.
description_view_3: The barrels are prominent with partial red text, and the crates are stacked in the foreground.
